meta.release_notes:
# Changelog
All notable changes to this model will be documented in this file.

## [Unreleased]

## [1.0.0] - 2025-07-01
### Added
- initial version of this model

### Changed


### Removed

nodes.label: Report8D
nodes.description: Aspect Model for the Quality Management business case describing an 8D report. An 8D report (Eight Disciplines) is a structured problem-solving method used primarily in quality management to identify, correct, and eliminate recurring issues. It guides teams through eight steps, including root cause analysis and implementation of permanent corrective actions. The goal is to improve processes, prevent future problems, and ensure customer satisfaction.

nodes.label: header
nodes.description: The header of the 8D Report

nodes.label: stepD1
nodes.description: First step of the 8D Report. Containing information about the team members working on the root cause analysis

nodes.label: stepD2
nodes.description: Second step of the 8D Report.

nodes.label: stepD3
nodes.description: Third step of the 8D Report

nodes.label: stepD4
nodes.description: Fourth Step of the 8D Report

nodes.label: stepD5
nodes.description: Fifth step of the 8D Report

nodes.label: stepD6
nodes.description: Sixth step of the 8D Report

nodes.label: stepD7
nodes.description: Seventh step of the 8D Report

nodes.label: stepD8
nodes.description: Eighth step of the 8D Report

nodes.label: stepD0
nodes.description: Optional Step D0 used for the Global 8D Standard

nodes.label: complaintDate
nodes.description: The date of claim is the specific date on which the claim was filed.

nodes.label: lastRevisionDate
nodes.description: The date of last revision refers to the most recent date on which the document was updated.

nodes.label: title
nodes.description: The title of the 8D report is the official title given to the 8D report.

nodes.label: customerComplaintId
nodes.description: The customer specific ID of the complaint process is the identifier assigned to the complaint process by the customer.

nodes.label: supplierComplaintId
nodes.description: The supplier specific ID of the complaint process is the identifier assigned to the complaint process by the supplier.

nodes.label: customerContact
nodes.description: The Contact of the customer

nodes.label: supplierContact
nodes.description: The Contact of the supplier

nodes.label: parts
nodes.description: Information about the effected parts

nodes.label: complaintLocation
nodes.description: Defines the location of the complaint

nodes.label: sponsor
nodes.description: Sponsor of the 8D Report

nodes.label: teamLeader
nodes.description: team leader

nodes.label: contactPerson
nodes.description: contact person

nodes.label: teamMembers
nodes.description: Team members

nodes.label: symptomDescription
nodes.description: Describes which symptoms lead to the claim

nodes.label: problemDescription
nodes.description: Describes the problem of the complaint and the consequences that arise from it

nodes.label: errorType
nodes.description: Describes the error type to be classified

nodes.label: riskAssessmentStarted
nodes.description: Describes at what point the risk assessment was started - the date as yyyy-mm-dd

nodes.label: riskAssessmentUpdated
nodes.description: Describes at what point the risk assessment was updated - the date as yyyy-mm-dd

nodes.label: qualityTaskAttachmentId
nodes.description: Allows to link an quality task attachment with added information about the complaint e.g. dimensions, photos, production data,….

nodes.label: errorLocation
nodes.description: Describes at which component or location the error occurred

nodes.label: descriptionOfInterimContainmentActions
nodes.description: Describes interim containment action to resolve the quality problem in the short term

nodes.label: causes
nodes.description: Describes and lists the root cause(s)

nodes.label: definePermanentCorrectiveActions
nodes.description: Describes and lists planned permanent corrective measure(s)

nodes.label: implementedCorrectiveMeasures
nodes.description: A List of implemented corrective measures

nodes.label: errorPreventiveMeasures
nodes.description: Describes and lists error preventive measure(s)

nodes.label: resultAssesment
nodes.description: Allows a summary of the measure and a final statement on its effectiveness

nodes.label: closingDate
nodes.description: Determining the time of 8D completion

nodes.label: defineEmergencyResponseAction
nodes.description: Describes and lists planned permanent corrective measure(s)

nodes.label: companyName
nodes.description: The name of the buyer company is the official registered name of the buyer's business.

nodes.label: street
nodes.description: The street of the contact refers to the street address where the contact's business is located.

nodes.label: city
nodes.description: The location of the contact indicates the city or town where the contact operates.

nodes.label: postalCode
nodes.description: The postal code of the contact is the ZIP or postal code for the contact's address.

nodes.label: country
nodes.description: The country of the contact specifies the nation where the contact's business is based.

nodes.label: supplierPartNumber
nodes.description: The part number of the supplier is the identifier assigned to the part by the supplier.

nodes.label: customerPartNumber
nodes.description: The part number of the customer is the identifier assigned to the part by the customer.

nodes.label: orderNumber
nodes.description: The order number of the part is the number associated with the purchase order for the part.

nodes.label: name
nodes.description: The name of the person working on the 8D-report

nodes.label: department
nodes.description: The department of the person working on the 8D-report

nodes.label: role
nodes.description: The role in the company of the person working on the 8D-report

nodes.label: proofOfEffectiveness
nodes.description: Explain how the effectiveness of this measure has been validated

nodes.label: effectivenessResult
nodes.description: Explain to which extend / percentage the measure is effective

nodes.label: introductionDate
nodes.description: Definition of the date of introduction of the immediate measures - the date as yyyy-mm-dd

nodes.label: responsiblePerson
nodes.description: Person responsible for the implementation of the planned corrective measure

nodes.label: riskOfImmediateMeasure
nodes.description: Describes the risk of introduction an immediate measure

nodes.label: methodForEffectivenessCheck
nodes.description: Describes the method for testing and demonstrating effectiveness

nodes.label: typeOfCauses
nodes.description: There are different types of causes which are defined in 4 different categories.

nodes.label: causeHypothesisDescription
nodes.description: Describes the causal hypothesis

nodes.label: verificationBy
nodes.description: Name the person responsible for investigating the hypothesis

nodes.label: clarificationDate
nodes.description: Determination of the date of clarification of the cause - the date as yyyy-mm-dd

nodes.label: result
nodes.description: The result describes the outcome of a causal hypothesis

nodes.label: method
nodes.description: Describes the method for forming the causal hypothesis

nodes.label: report
nodes.description: Describes in detail the result of the investigated root cause hypothesis

nodes.label: errorCauseCategory
nodes.description: Describes the error cause category (ID) according to the VDA error catalog

nodes.label: causeAssignment
nodes.description: Define for which root cause the measure is relevant

nodes.label: status
nodes.description: Implementation status

nodes.label: measure
nodes.description: Plan technical measure to resolve the quality problem permanently
